headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Own for Decades and 2 We Question
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: OpenAI revamps shopping experience in ChatGPT after struggling with Instant Checkout offering
summary: OpenAI said the new experience will make it easier for users to find and compare products.

headline: If You Invested $1000 in eBay a Decade Ago, This is How Much It'd Be Worth Now
summary: Why investing for the long run, especially if you buy certain popular stocks, could reap huge rewards.
